title: Visible Fire Aspect
description: This is a small resource pack that makes swords with the Fire Aspect enchantment appear to burn.
body:
This small resource pack makes swords enchanted with Fire Aspect look as if they’re **burning.**

If this pack gets 5000+ downloads, I’ll create Visible Fire Aspect variants for these mods:  
- [**Twilight Forest**](<https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest>)
- [**Aether**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/aether/versions>) (including the [**Aether Lost Content Addon**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-lost-content/versions>) mod!)
- [**Deeper and Darker**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker/versions>)
- [**Blue Skies**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies/versions>)
- [**Advanced Netherite**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite/versions>)
- [**Enderite CJ Edition**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-cj-edition>)
- [**Gilded Armor CJ Edition**](<https://modrinth.com/mod/gilded-armor-cj-edition>)  

If you have other ideas, let me know in my [**Discord server**](<https://discord.gg/xm3nSUwUka>)!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This pack has not reached 5000+ downloads, so I will not start working on the variants!

</details>



### IMPORTANT!!!

**This recource pack requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) if you are using a version older than 1.21.5!!**
> ### [Check out my other packs!](<https://modrinth.com/user/EpicA1M>)
> [**All My Packs**](<https://modrinth.com/collection/1P9Fp1vd>)
